blended.narrative: Big Sky is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 4.2 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 7,412 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 2.0" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 2.2" of snow, highs of 22°F. Expect powder.

recent_conditions.narrative: 2.4" of new snow over the past week. Base has been melting — down 5" over the past week. Current depth: 55".
